basics.name: John Doe
basics.label: Principal Software Engineer | AI/ML & Cloud Architect
basics.summary: Principal Software Engineer with 12+ years of experience spanning full-stack development, cloud architecture, machine learning systems, and MLOps. Proven expertise in designing scalable AI platforms, agentic workflows, microservices architectures, and enterprise-grade cloud systems. Strong leader experienced in mentoring teams and driving end-to-end product delivery.
basics.disabilityStatus: No, I do not have a disability and have not had one in the past.
basics.Please use 3-4 sentences to describe you: I have led the design and deployment of large-scale AI and machine learning systems across automotive, advertising, and SaaS industries. My industrial experience includes building enterprise AI assistants, real-time fraud detection systems, scalable model serving platforms, and end-to-end MLOps pipelines using cloud-native infrastructure. I have architected microservices-based platforms and agentic AI workflows that support high-availability production workloads. My research background includes published academic work in knowledge management systems and applied machine learning, bridging theoretical foundations with practical enterprise applications.

work.name: abc Motors
work.summary: Design and architect enterprise-grade AI systems with focus on AI agents, RAG-based applications, and scalable MLOps platforms.
highlights: Architected enterprise AI assistant framework for internal domain-specific assistants
Built scalable MLOps pipelines using Databricks and MLflow
Led AI infrastructure design including model serving and observability

work.name: Tech stack
work.summary: Led development of cloud-native microservices and AI-integrated applications.
highlights: Architected microservices platform using Kubernetes and Docker
Reduced deployment time by 60% via CI/CD automation
Integrated ML-driven APIs into customer-facing applications

work.name: google Inc.
work.summary: Designed and operated large-scale ML systems powering fraud detection and ad targeting platforms.
highlights: Built real-time and batch model serving systems
Developed feature engineering pipelines and feature stores
Led automated ML deployment and monitoring systems
